'''âg-v-y''' ('''kagavay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbias|unbias]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbias|unbias]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-v-y
|-
! Lemma
| kagavay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigavay|thigavay]] || [[word:jigavay|jigavay]] || [[word:shigavay|shigavay]] || [[word:kigavay|kigavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugavay|thuthugavay]] || [[word:jujugavay|jujugavay]] || [[word:shushugavay|shushugavay]] || [[word:kukugavay|kukugavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugavay|thugavay]] || [[word:jugavay|jugavay]] || [[word:shugavay|shugavay]] || [[word:kugavay|kugavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugavay|thugavay]] || [[word:jugavay|jugavay]] || [[word:shugavay|shugavay]] || [[word:kugavay|kugavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegavay|thegavay]] || [[word:jegavay|jegavay]] || [[word:shegavay|shegavay]] || [[word:kegavay|kegavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogavay|thothogavay]] || [[word:jojogavay|jojogavay]] || [[word:shoshogavay|shoshogavay]] || [[word:kokogavay|kokogavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogavay|thogavay]] || [[word:jogavay|jogavay]] || [[word:shogavay|shogavay]] || [[word:kogavay|kogavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogavay|thogavay]] || [[word:jogavay|jogavay]] || [[word:shogavay|shogavay]] || [[word:kogavay|kogavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgavay|thĂŠgavay]] || [[word:jĂŠgavay|jĂŠgavay]] || [[word:shĂŠgavay|shĂŠgavay]] || [[word:kĂŠgavay|kĂŠgavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagavay|thathagavay]] || [[word:jajagavay|jajagavay]] || [[word:shashagavay|shashagavay]] || [[word:kakagavay|kakagavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagavay|thagavay]] || [[word:jagavay|jagavay]] || [[word:shagavay|shagavay]] || [[word:kagavay|kagavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagavay|thagavay]] || [[word:jagavay|jagavay]] || [[word:shagavay|shagavay]] || [[word:kagavay|kagavay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagavay|shagavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagavay|goshagavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagavay|gokishagavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagavaynĂŒ|shagavaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagavaynknĂŒ|goshagavaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavaynĂŒ|gokishagavaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagavayshĂ«|shagavayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagavaynkshĂ«|goshagavaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagavayshĂ«|gokishagavayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavayro|shagavayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavaynkro|goshagavaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavayro|gokishagavayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavaymu|shagavaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavaynkmu|goshagavaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavaymu|gokishagavaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagavaysher|shagavaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagavaynksher|goshagavaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagavaysher|gokishagavaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagavayng|shagavayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagavaynkng|goshagavaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagavayng|gokishagavayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagavaya|shagavaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagavaynkya|goshagavaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagavaya|gokishagavaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagavayam|shagavayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagavaynkyam|goshagavaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagavayam|gokishagavayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavaynĂŒshĂ«|shagavaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshagavaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishagavaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavaynĂŒro|shagavaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavaynknĂŒro|goshagavaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavaynĂŒro|gokishagavaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavaynĂŒmu|shagavaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavaynknĂŒmu|goshagavaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavaynĂŒmu|gokishagavaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavayshĂ«nĂŒ|shagavayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagavaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagavayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavayshĂ«ro|shagavayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavaynkshĂ«ro|goshagavaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavayshĂ«ro|gokishagavayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavayshĂ«mu|shagavayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavaynkshĂ«mu|goshagavaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavayshĂ«mu|gokishagavayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavayronĂŒ|shagavayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavaynkronĂŒ|goshagavaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavayronĂŒ|gokishagavayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavayroshĂ«|shagavayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavaynkroshĂ«|goshagavaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavayroshĂ«|gokishagavayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavayromu|shagavayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavaynkromu|goshagavaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavayromu|gokishagavayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavaymunĂŒ|shagavaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavaynkmunĂŒ|goshagavaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavaymunĂŒ|gokishagavaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavaymushĂ«|shagavaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavaynkmushĂ«|goshagavaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavaymushĂ«|gokishagavaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavaymuro|shagavaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavaynkmuro|goshagavaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavaymuro|gokishagavaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
